title: Draper Expert 22mm Wood Drill Bit | Faster Hole Cutting |Carbon Steel Tools | Manual & Electric Tip Drills | Heavy Duty Bits | 41590
features: Durable – Manufactured from hardened and properly tempered carbon steel for exceptional strength and durability
Versatile – Fulfil all your drilling tasks with our drill bit set that is compatible with manual and Power Drills
Powerful –Precision double ground tri-point for fast waste removal and enhanced cutting performance
Effective – Expert Quality flat wood bit featuring a precision-ground central point and enhanced design cutting edge spurs for superior performance
Reliable – Peace of mind with Draper Expert quality guaranteed for reliability and performance
description: From the manufacturer Draper About Us We’re an independent family business. It begins with our founder Bert Draper and his wife Emily. In 2019, We celebrate our centenary. Draper is our core range of quality tools which are suitable for enthusiasts and tradespeople alike. Draper 41590 Expert Flat Wood Drill Bit, 22.0mm Ø , Blue Draper Tools 41590 Flat Wood Bit with a precision ground central point and enhanced design cutting edge spurs, which deliver greater waste removal compared with standard flat wood bits. Made from high quality carbon steel that's correctly hardened and tempered. Each cutting edge is expertly ground and finished for maximum performance. Ideal for use with combi drills, drill drivers and impact drivers.
